_comment: Suspicion policy: sus = max(flag_weight[behavior], reason_weight[reason]) x (night?night_mult:1) x (in_zone?zone_mult:1), clamped to [0,1]. ROUTE (3-way): sus>=alert_at AND NN sure -> alert (fire now); review_at<=sus<alert_at OR unsure NN -> vlm (manager checks); sus<review_at -> dismiss. sus_alert (legacy bool) = sus>=threshold. Tune per site — the same pacing is benign at noon and an alert at 3am. Copy to sus_policy.json and point SUS_POLICY at it.
